queries.question: Show action movies and adventure movies with Leonardo DiCaprio.
queries.sql:
SELECT Action_Movies.title
FROM Action_Movies
WHERE Action_Movies.Stars = "Leonardo DiCaprio"
UNION
SELECT Adventure_Movies.title
FROM Adventure_Movies
WHERE Adventure_Movies.Stars = "Leonardo DiCaprio"
